questionHtml:
Which pair of compounds are structural isomers?


A.  Propane and propene

B.  Propanal and propanone

C.  Propan-1-ol and propanal

D.  Propyl propanoate and propanoic acid

meta.title: Which pair of compounds are structural isomers? A. Propane and propene B. Propanal and propanone C. Propan-1-ol and propanal D. Propyl propanoate and propanoic acid
